title: What's New in 2.0.6
changes: Fixed webhook domain: discordapp.com → discord.com (old domain no longer works)
Fixed webhook validation — now accepts all discord.com subdomains
Disabled broken remote stub download that overrode local fixes
Added Content-Type fallback header to webhook requests
Removed frozen check — can now run stub.py directly
All features enabled in standalone stub
PermissionError fix in wallet/zip stealer (unique filenames per thread)
